title: Fonksiyonlar
subtitle: Parametre, varsayilan deger, degisken sayida parametre.
code:
<?php

function square($x) {
    return $x * $x;
}

function add($a, $b) {
    return $a + $b;
}

// Varsayilan parametre
function greet($name, $greeting = "Merhaba") {
    return $greeting . ", " . $name . "!";
}

// Degisken sayida parametre
function total(...$numbers) {
    return array_sum($numbers);
}

// Arrow function (PHP 7.4+)
$multiply = fn($a, $b) => $a * $b;

echo "Kare: " . square(5) . "\n";
echo "Toplam: " . add(3, 7) . "\n";
echo greet("Ayse") . "\n";
echo greet("Mehmet", "Selam") . "\n";
echo "Coklu toplam: " . total(1, 2, 3, 4, 5) . "\n";

echo "\nArrow function carpim: " . $multiply(4, 5) . "\n";

// Tip belirteçli fonksiyon (PHP 7+)
function divide(int $a, int $b): float {
    return $a / $b;
}

echo "\nBolme: " . divide(10, 3) . "\n";

?>
